title: silene fruticosa subsp. fruticosa
intro: Silene fruticosa subsp. fruticosa, also known as the Red Campion, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Silene fruticosa subsp. fruticosa include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs and colds, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make remedies for various ailments.
